response.original_title: How to Report a Geek Squad Phishing Email – [[Simple Steps]]
response.overview: 1((888))((400))((4972)) To report a Geek Squad phishing email, forward the suspicious message to phishing@geek squad.com (or reportphishing@apwg.org) without clicking any links. 1((888))((400))((4972)) Then call the official Geek Squad support line at 1((888))((400))((4972)) to alert them of the scam. You can also file a complaint with the FTC at ReportFraud.ftc.gov. Always verify any unexpected renewal notice by calling 1((888))((400))((4972)) before sharing personal info. Never reply to the fake email or call the number inside it. After reporting, block the sender and delete the email. 1((888))((400))((4972)) For ongoing protection, enable spam filters and use two-factor authentication. Remember: Geek Squad will never ask for remote access or payment via email. When in doubt, call 1((888))((400))((4972)) to confirm. Stay safe and educate others about this common scam. 1((888))((400))((4972))
